mcp_status.websearch_fallback: PARTIAL (used for disjointness verification and KEGG)
mcp_status.kegg_rest: PARTIAL (WebFetch returned empty; used WebSearch for pathway IDs)

top_papers.title: Long-term histone lactylation connects metabolic and epigenetic rewiring in innate immune memory
top_papers.significance: LANDMARK: H3K18la as 90-day persistent epigenetic mark of trained immunity. Mechanistic chain: BCG->glycolysis->lactate->EP300->H3K18la->enhancers->cytokines

top_papers.title: Cross-kingdom mechanisms of trained immunity in plant systemic acquired resistance
top_papers.significance: Cross-kingdom trained immunity review. Pipecolic acid acts as SAR signal in plants AND mTOR modulator in mammalian immunity. Identifies shared epigenetic priming mechanisms.

top_papers.title: Metabolite-dependent m6A methylation driven by mechanotransduction-metabolism-epitranscriptomics axis promotes bone development and regeneration
top_papers.significance: CRITICAL BRIDGE: First mechanotransduction->m6A axis. ECM mechanics->succinate elevation->FTO inhibition->METTL3-driven m6A->Runx2->osteogenesis. Only in MSCs; immune cell context unexplored.

top_papers.title: Histone lactylation regulates PRKN-Mediated mitophagy to promote M2 Macrophage polarization in bladder cancer
top_papers.significance: H3K18la->PRKN->mitophagy->M2 macrophage immunosuppression in cancer. Creates H3K18la paradox: same mark drives trained immunity AND tumor immune evasion.

top_papers.title: Fine-tuning of gene expression through the Mettl3-Mettl14-Dnmt1 axis controls ESC differentiation
top_papers.significance: METTL3-METTL14 recruits DNMT1 to chromatin for gene-body 5mC. First RNA methylation->DNA methylation crosstalk. Unexplored in trained immunity.

top_papers.title: Genetic Toggle Switch in Plants
top_papers.significance: First stable bistable toggle switch in stably engineered plants. Opens plant immune circuit engineering. Toggle logic maps to H3K18la bistability in macrophages.

top_papers.title: Mechanobiology of the blood-brain barrier during development, disease and ageing
top_papers.significance: BBB mechanobiology review. Shear stress and ECM stiffness regulate neurological disease. Piezo1 as mechanosensor. BBB x epitranscriptomics unexplored.

top_papers.title: Innate Immune Memory is Stimulus Specific
top_papers.significance: Trained immunity is stimulus-specific (qualitatively distinct epigenetic programs). Key constraint for hypothesis generation.

cross_domain_pairs.evidence: One 2025 paper in MSCs/bone (PMID 40272981). Zero papers in macrophages/immune cells. Succinate->FTO->m6A axis unexplored in immunity.
Zero papers linking m6A to trained immunity longevity. METTL3-DNMT1 axis (Quarto 2025) unexplored in monocyte training context.
Conrath 2025 (Nature Plants) establishes conceptual parallel. Pipecolic acid cross-kingdom activity noted. Zero mechanistic papers testing pip in human monocytes.
Zero papers applying synthetic biology circuit logic to epigenetic bistability in immune cells. Kassaw 2025 toggle logic and H3K18la bistability are not connected in any paper.
Multiple 2025 papers. Active research area. Avoid as primary target.

key_anomalies: H3K18la drives both trained immunity (beneficial) AND tumor immune evasion (harmful) — same mark, opposite outcomes
Pipecolic acid is primary plant SAR signal AND mammalian mTOR modulator — cross-kingdom metabolite with unknown mechanistic explanation
Succinate from mechanical stress inhibits FTO -> m6A elevation: mechanical force encodes epitranscriptomic memory
top_recommended_target: m6A epitranscriptomics x trained immunity duration (mechanobiology bridge via succinate-FTO axis)
